red_test.reason: The node records Mission golden-path and workspace-root gaps without mutating the existing dirty Mission checkout.

targeted_test.output: Mission tests passed on the existing dirty, main-branch checkout.

integration_test.output: Mission vet and build passed; generated binary was removed and pre-existing dirty state was preserved.

status_test.command: inspect Mission CLI/readback and Atlas continuation source surfaces
status_test.output: Mission exposes durable routing, event index/search, dashboard, doctor, replay, readiness, manifest, and Atlas continuation readbacks without execution authority.

next_test.command: inspect roadmap handoff for workspace-root Foundry preflight and golden-path requirements
next_test.output: The handoff requires an isolated Foundry worktree, repository-relative workspace-root integration test, exact digest approval, verified diff, and rollback receipt; those are downstream requirements, not Mission execution behavior.

objective: Audit AO Mission golden-path tiny-repository packet and workspace-root preflight readiness through a bounded Atlas compatibility evidence node without mutating the dirty Mission checkout or requesting execution.
